executive_summary: On April 4, 2026, OFAC removed one individual from the SDN list. The removed individual, Mikhail Mikhaylovich Zadornov, was previously sanctioned under the RUSSIA-EO14024 program. This change may impact compliance efforts related to Russian sanctions.

risk_implications.description: The removal of Mikhail Mikhaylovich Zadornov from the SDN list may reduce the risk of inadvertently doing business with a sanctioned individual, but entities should still exercise caution when dealing with Russian persons and entities.

program_highlights.note: One individual was removed from the program

compliance_recommendations: Review and update internal watchlists to reflect the removal of Mikhail Mikhaylovich Zadornov from the SDN list
Continue to monitor OFAC updates and adjust compliance programs accordingly
